description: An aerospace engineer left a specification document for the CommSat-Alpha mission at ~/Desktop/upper_stage_specs.txt. Your task is to design a continuous finite burn for the launch vehicle's upper stage to inject the payload into Geostationary Transfer Orbit (GTO). Using the initial parking orbit, mass properties, and propulsion specifications from the document, create a GMAT script that models the propulsion hardware (ChemicalTank, ChemicalThruster, FiniteBurn) to execute a strictly prograde burn. The burn must be initiated at the Descending Node (True Anomaly = 180.0 deg) and continue until the spacecraft's apoapsis radius reaches exactly 42164.14 km. Save the GMAT script to ~/GMAT_output/gto_injection.script and generate a report at ~/GMAT_output/gto_injection_report.txt containing the burn_duration_seconds, final_apoapsis_km, and remaining_fuel_kg. Login: username=ga, password=password123
